===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Johto Elite Four Adventures.png|thumb|230px|Will in Pokémon Adventures]]
====History====
=====Past=====
Will, along with [[Karen]], {{adv|Green}}, {{adv|Silver}}, [[Sham]], and [[Carl]], was one of the children raised by the [[Masked Man]] to be his servants. Unlike Silver and Green, Will was not kidnapped and went to the Masked Man willingly out of boredom.

====={{MangaArc|Gold, Silver & Crystal}}=====
Will debuted with Karen at the [[Ilex Forest]], where they have been tasked with guarding the area. When Green arrived to stop the Masked Man's plan to capture {{p|Celebi}}, she was attacked by Will and Karen. With the {{adv|Tower duo|Lugia and Ho-Oh}} they borrowed from the Masked Man, Will and Karen exploited Green's fear of birds to torture her. When Green learned that Will and Karen also defeated and captured Silver, she overcame her fear of birds and sent out {{p|Articuno}}, {{p|Zapdos}}, and {{p|Moltres}} to fight. Green and her allies, {{adv|Red}} and {{adv|Blue}}, each used one of the legendary birds to battle Will and Karen. With the assistance of many Pokémon sent from all across [[Johto]] and [[Kanto]], Lugia and Ho-Oh were freed from the Masked Man's control and flew away. Defeated, Will made his escape, only to be punished later by the Masked Man for doing so.

After the Masked Man's defeat, Will and Karen were approached by [[Bruno]] and [[Koga]], who offered to form an alliance since all four of them were once members of various criminal organizations.

====={{MangaArc|HeartGold & SoulSilver}}=====
It is revealed that Will, Karen, Bruno, and Koga were all made members of the Johto [[Elite Four]] by the [[Pokémon Association]]. The Johto Elite Four went to the [[Pokéathlon]] as an act of promotion for the Pokémon League. There, they met {{adv|Gold}}, whom they challenged to the Power Course. Although they easily defeated Gold in the first two events, Gold gained enough points in the third event to win overall.

The Pokémon latched on to Lugia and {{p|Ho-Oh}}, and their combined power freed the two from the Masked Man's control. Now freed, Lugia and Ho-Oh flew off to parts unknown.}}
